creator: dmitry_kuleshov@ukr.net
text: One more notice - Intel 82576 LAN card capable of SR-IOV, i have activate this function in Win device properties, Hyper-V LAN card settings, and Guest machine settings. After guest Gen2 VM starts it shows "Active" in Hyper-V status, but not "Used". In FreeBSD device did not catch any drivers for SR-IOV guest device. Seems that, regards of Microsoft declare that it supports SR-IOV by FreeBSD guest, but in fact it's not supports at all.
